title: The Five Boxes
description: The Foundry sorts incoming reality into a small number of governed action families. A box is not just a folder — it is a governed action family. Documents enter the process through one of these boxes.
tagline: Simple boxes. Clear routing. Lower chaos.

boxes.name: Create
boxes.meaning: Bring a new thing into the system.

boxes.name: Plan
boxes.meaning: Prepare future work without touching live reality yet.

boxes.name: Control
boxes.meaning: Approve, reject, route, or govern a change.

boxes.name: Reference
boxes.meaning: Store evidence or context without directly changing the system.
